text: The world here feels cold and dim, out of phase with the day’s rhythm. The sharp light overhead throws uneasy shadows upon glossy surfaces, and my presence echoes silently down empty corridors. When I enter the blue R+D space, the words about sunlight and surrender contrast with the utilitarian technology: there is a tension between the promise of innovation and the comfort of simply being present. I feel small, both inspired and a little isolated, in these neatly ordered, artificial realms.
